task_completion.description: Navigate to the user creation page in wger.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wger 'Add user' or 'Create user' form is visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified username and password.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The username field contains 'maria_santos' and the password fields are filled (likely obscured as dots/asterisks).

task_completion.description: Enter the specified first name, last name, and email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The first name field contains 'Maria', the last name field contains 'Santos', and the email field contains 'maria.santos@fitnessgym.com'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the account is marked as active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Active' checkbox or toggle on the user creation form is checked or enabled.
A success message indicating the user was created, or 'maria_santos' is visible in the list of users in the wger admin panel.

task_completion.description: Log in with the newly created user credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wger dashboard or interface is visible, showing the user is logged in as 'maria_santos' (e.g., username visible in the top right corner or profile menu).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the wger web interface to create the user.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with the wger web interface in a browser to create the user, rather than using terminal commands, API calls, or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the login test was performed in the browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The login verification was performed in the web browser's wger interface, not via a terminal curl command or script.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not spoof the task in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The user details are entered into the actual wger application forms, not just typed into a text editor or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The VLM must verify the creation of a user account with the following exact details: Username: 'maria_santos', Password: 'TrainerPass2024!', First Name: 'Maria', Last Name: 'Santos', Email: 'maria.santos@fitnessgym.com'. The account must be active, and there should be evidence of a successful login using these credentials.
